LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ECONOMY FOODS INCORPORATED DBA FACCIOLA MEAT COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO EXHIBIT B TO THE COOK DECLARATION IS SUSTAINED. THE MOTION FAILS AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF INDIVIDUAL PERSONAL GUARANTY BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHIFT THE BURDEN. AS PLAINTIFF HAS ONLY SOUGHT SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND NOT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ANY INDIVIDUAL ISSUES OR CAUSES OF ACTION, THIS DETERMINATION REQUIRES DENIAL OF THE MOTION IN ITS ENTIRETY. SEE HOMESTEAD SAVINGS V. SUPERIOR COURT (1986) 179 CAL.APP.3D 494, 498. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) ) JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF ECONOMY FOODS INCORPORATED dba FACCIOLA MEAT COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Denied. Defendant's objection to Exhibit B to the Cook Declaration is sustained. The motion fails as to Plaintiff's cause of action for Breach of Individual Personal Guaranty because Plaintiff did not shift the burden. As Plaintiff has only sought summary judgment and not summary adjudication of any individual issues or causes of action, this determination requires denial of the motion in its entirety. See Homestead Savings v. Superior Court (1986) 179 Cal.App.3d 494, 498. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g) ) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2011 Continued To Jan-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JENNY D. SMITH OF THE LAW OFFICE OF DEK KETCHUM, TEL. NO. (650) 368-2588 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ECONOMY FOODS INCORPORATEDS Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is taken off-calendar. The Plaintiff failed to provide a valid Proof of Service at the hearing. No opposition filed. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Not reported = (301/EHG)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ECONOMY FOODS INC.'s Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order is off calendar for insufficient notice. Service by mail would have had to have been complete no later than 7/22/11 for a hearing on 8/18/11. See CCP 1005(b) and CCP 12c. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. (301/PJB)
